description: This pipeline takes the output of the trackmate-spots-to-roi node, uses this output for further calculations and then outputs it as a compartment, the main steps involve converting spots to ROI, calculating statistics between two sets of ROI which results in measurements and then outputting these measurements

6d30c68f-8849-4891-bd93-eca41b9a042e.name: ij1-roi-relation-2d
6d30c68f-8849-4891-bd93-eca41b9a042e.description:
Extracts all pairwise statistics between the 2D ROI

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
